title: Gorgonzola and Cheese Tibs
description: A twist on traditional Ethiopian Tibs, this dish combines the savory flavors of gorgonzola cheese with tender beef.

ingredients.name: Gorgonzola cheese
ingredients.notes: Can be substituted with other strong cheeses

ingredients.name: Tibs spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most African or Middle Eastern markets

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onions and cook until they begin to caramelize, about 5 minutes.
Add the tibs spice blend and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the gorgonzola cheese and cook until melted and well combined.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with grated cheese.
